backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the IPGT backend with user profiles, IP record registration, a token ledger with burn mechanics, and access-controlled admin/treasury functions.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that RegisterIP.tsx and RegistrationSuccessModal.tsx were updated to display the correct 0.02 IPGT burn fee instead of 100 IPGT.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a build-planning reference for the IPGT frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind layers and defines OKLCH-based light and dark CSS custom properties for the app's design system.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell with the IPGT page title, favicon, and a root div that mounts the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router tree with routes for Home, Register IP, IP Database, and Coin Dashboard, and conditionally renders the ProfileSetupModal for new authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the IPGT logo, copyright year, and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM parameters.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, nav links, authenticated user's IPGT token balance display, and Internet Identity login/logout handling.
frontend/src/components/IPCard.tsx: Reusable card component that renders a summary of an IP record including category badge, jurisdiction, owner, date, and truncated document hash with gold hover effects.
frontend/src/components/IPDetailModal.ts: A modal dialog that displays detailed information about a specific IP record (title, category, owner, hash, dates) fetched by ID, with copy-to-clipboard support for monospace fields.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: A simple layout wrapper that composes Header, main content area, and Footer into a full-height flex column.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A blocking modal form that collects a user's name and optional email to create their profile on first login, using the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/RegistrationSucc: A confirmation modal shown after successful IP registration, displaying the new record ID and IPGT tokens burned, with options to register another or navigate to the database.
frontend/src/components/TokenStats.tsx: Displays IPGT token statistics (user balance, circulating supply, total burned) either as a compact inline badge or a full three-card grid depending on the showAll prop.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using TanStack Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout flow, and expose the current identity and login status via React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile CRUD, token balance/transfer/supply queries, and IP record search/filter/registration operations using the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Tailwind and Google Fonts, defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a dark navy/gold theme with light and dark mode variants, plus utility component classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CoinDashboard.tsx: Authenticated page for viewing IPGT token stats and transferring tokens to another principal, with form validation and error/success feedback.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero banner, feature highlights grid, and navigation CTAs for browsing the IP database or registering new IP, adapting buttons based on authentication state.
frontend/src/pages/IPDatabase.tsx: Paginated, searchable, and filterable public IP records browser supporting title search, category, and jurisdiction filters with a detail modal for individual records.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterIP.tsx: React page for registering intellectual property, including a form with title, description, category, jurisdiction, file upload (with client-side SHA-256 hashing), and submission logic that calls the backend registerIP mutation and shows a success modal or error messages.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom color palette (gold, navy, charcoal, chart colors, sidebar), custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), border radius variables, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the IP Global Terminal (IPGT) ICP-based application, including its architectural notes, existing features (authentication, IP registration, database browsing, coin dashboard), known issues, and versioning metadata.
